message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first list_active_mutes in 2 CLI surfaces (tick 270)

Migrates 2 remaining ambient `list_active_mutes` call sites in
`frankenterm/main.rs` to the `_with_cx` sibling:

- L26179 `ft events` list path (noise-control mutes annotation):
  `list_active_mutes_with_cx(&mutes_cx, now_events)`
- L31234 `ft robot events` triage path:
  `list_active_mutes_with_cx(&triage_mutes_cx, now_triage)`

Both fetch active event mutes for rendering noise-control annotations
on the events listing output. Each site resolves cx via
`Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)` with distinct binding
names (`mutes_cx`, `triage_mutes_cx`) since neither shares a cx with
surrounding code.

These were the last two ambient `list_active_mutes` call sites in
production main.rs (the remaining site at L31677 already used the
cx-first variant per the tick-239 sweep).

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 84 (187-270).
main.rs cross-crate migration total: 131 sites (129 before + 2).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 45 (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
